languages.text: "Этих самых братьев-генералов, по преданиям, пруд-пруди. На каждого хорошего человека хватит. Они своими бойцами в войнушку играть любят, чтобы люди не за Бога-Императора, а просто так гибли. Иногда и к звездам посылают, другие полки прикрывать, не без того. Первый Призыв, предки наши, из таких вот бедолаг, которые братьям в руки попали, набран и был".

"As the stories go, there were plenty of these Brother-Generals. More than enough to claim every decent soul. They treated their troops like toy soldiers, wasting their lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they sent them to the stars, but of course it was just to serve as shields for other regiments. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of just such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."
languages.original_text: "Этих самых братьев-генералов, по преданиям, пруд-пруди. На каждого хорошего человека хватит. Они своими бойцами в войнушку играть любят, чтобы люди не за Бога-Императора, а просто так гибли. Иногда и к звездам посылают, другие полки прикрывать, не без того. Первый Призыв, предки наши, из таких вот бедолаг, которые братьям в руки попали, набран и был".

traits.locale_text: "As the stories go, there're aplenty of these Brother-Generals. More than enough to claim every decent man. They treat their men like toy soldiers, wasting lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they send them to the stars to screen other regiments; that's part of it too. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of exactly such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."

"As the stories go, there were plenty of these Brother-Generals. More than enough to claim every decent man. They treated their men like toy soldiers, wasting their lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they sent them to the stars, but of course it was just to serve as shields for other regiments. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of just such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."

"So, the penal legions were assembled from people unlucky enough to end up in prison. As you can imagine, it's easy to find yourself behind bars there. Fail to meet your quota. Fall asleep on duty. Well, they drag you into the legion, and then they inject you with combat stimulants — and, then off you go to die. No pity. That is what our ancestors were like, that's what the First Call-Up was like."

"As the stories go, there're aplenty of these Brother-Generals. More than enough to claim every decent man. They treat their men like toy soldiers, wasting lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they send them to the stars to screen other regiments; that's part of it too. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of exactly such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."

They treated their men like toy soldiers, wasting their lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they sent them to the stars, but of course it was just to serve as shields for other regiments. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of just such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."

They treated their troops like toy soldiers, wasting their lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they sent them to the stars, but of course it was just to serve as shields for other regiments. languages.text: 「懲罰軍団は、運悪く刑務所送りになった連中から編成された。想像がつくだろうが、あそこでは鉄格子の内側に放り込まれるのはたやすい。ノルマ未達、勤務中の居眠り──そんなことでな。そうして軍団に引きずり込まれ、戦闘用興奮剤を打たれ、あとは死にに行かされる。情け容赦はない。それが私たちの祖先であり、第一回召集とはそういうものだった」
languages.original_text: "So, the penal legions were assembled from people unlucky enough to end up in prison. As you can imagine, it's easy to find yourself behind bars there. Fail to meet your quota. Fall asleep on duty. Well, they drag you into the legion, and then they inject you with combat stimulants — and, then off you go to die. No pity. That is what our ancestors were like, that's what the First Call-Up was like."

traits.locale_text: 「懲罰軍団は、運悪く刑務所送りになった連中から編成された。想像がつくだろうが、あそこでは鉄格子の内側に放り込まれるのはたやすい。ノルマ未達、勤務中の居眠り──そんなことでな。そうして軍団に引きずり込まれ、戦闘用興奮剤を打たれ、あとは死にに行かされる。情け容赦はない。それが私たちの祖先であり、第一回召集とはそういうものだった。」

languages.text: « Si l'on en croit les vieilles histoires, ces frères-généraux étaient fort nombreux. Plus qu'assez pour rafler tous les honnêtes gens. Ils jouaient avec la vie de leurs troupes et les sacrifiaient pour leur bon plaisir au lieu de soutenir la cause de l'Empereur-Dieu. De temps à autre, ils les envoyaient dans l'espace, mais uniquement pour servir de boucliers humains à d'autres régiments. Nos ancêtres de la Première Mobilisation n'étaient que de pauvres bougres qui ont eu le malheur de tomber aux mains des frères. »
languages.original_text: "As the stories go, there were plenty of these Brother-Generals. More than enough to claim every decent soul. They treated their troops like toy soldiers, wasting their lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they sent them to the stars, but of course it was just to serve as shields for other regiments. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of just such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."

Nos ancêtres de la Première Mobilisation n'étaient que de pauvres bougres qui ont eu le malheur de tomber aux mains des frères. »

languages.text: "Hikâyelere göre bu Rahip Generallerden epey varmış. Her düzgün ruha el koymaya yetecek kadar hatta. Birliklerine oyuncak asker muamelesi yapar, hayatlarını Tanrı İmparator'un davası yerine eğleneye harcarlarmış. Arada sırada onları, diğer alaylara karşı kalkan olarak hizmet etmeleri için yıldızlara gönderirlermiş. Atalarımızın oluşturduğu İlk Sevk Grubu da Rahiplerin eline düşen talihsiz delikanlılara örnektir."
languages.original_text: "As the stories go, there were plenty of these Brother-Generals. More than enough to claim every decent soul. They treated their troops like toy soldiers, wasting their lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they sent them to the stars, but of course it was just to serve as shields for other regiments. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of just such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."

Birliklerine oyuncak asker muamelesi yapar, hayatlarını Tanrı İmparator'un davası yerine eğleneye harcarlarmış. Arada sırada onları, diğer alaylara karşı kalkan olarak hizmet etmeleri için yıldızlara gönderirlermiş. Atalarımızın oluşturduğu İlk Sevk Grubu da Rahiplerin eline düşen talihsiz delikanlılara örnektir."

"Hikâyelere göre bu Rahip Generallerden epey varmış. Her düzgün adama el koymaya yetecek kadar hatta. Adamlarına oyuncak asker muamelesi yapar, hayatlarını Tanrı İmparator'un davası yerine eğleneye harcarlarmış. Arada sırada onları, diğer alaylara karşı kalkan olarak hizmet etmeleri için yıldızlara gönderirlermiş. Atalarımızın oluşturduğu İlk Sevk Grubu da Rahiplerin eline düşen talihsiz delikanlılara örnektir."

languages.text: «Según se cuenta, había muchos de esos hermanos generales. Más que suficientes para alistar a toda alma decente. Trataban a sus tropas como si fueran soldados de juguete, sacrificándolos por diversión y no por la causa del Dios Emperador. De vez en cuando los enviaban a las estrellas, pero solo como escudos humanos para otros regimientos. Los primeros llamados, nuestros ancestros, fueron algunos de los desdichados que acabaron en manos de aquellos hermanos».
languages.original_text: "As the stories go, there were plenty of these Brother-Generals. More than enough to claim every decent soul. They treated their troops like toy soldiers, wasting their lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they sent them to the stars, but of course it was just to serve as shields for other regiments. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of just such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."

traits.locale_text: «Según se cuenta, había muchos de esos hermanos generales. Más que suficientes para alistar a toda alma decente. Trataban a sus tropas como si fueran soldados de juguete, sacrificándolos por diversión y no por la causa del Dios Emperador. De vez en cuando los enviaban a las estrellas, pero solo como escudos humanos para otros regimientos. Los primeros llamados, nuestros ancestros, fueron algunos de los desdichados que acabaron en manos de aquellos hermanos».

«Según se cuenta, había muchos de esos hermanos generales. Más que suficientes para alistar a todo hombre decente. Trataban a su gente como si fueran soldados de juguete, sacrificándolos por diversión y no por la causa del Dios Emperador. De vez en cuando los enviaban a las estrellas, pero solo como escudos humanos para otros regimientos. Los primeros llamados, nuestros ancestros, fueron algunos de los desdichados que acabaron en manos de aquellos hermanos».

languages.text: “传说里，这样的将军兄弟多得是，多到足够把所有像样的人都抓走。他们视手下如玩偶，用他们的性命取乐，而不是为神皇效命。有时还会把他们送上星空，但说白了，就是去给别的军团当盾牌。初代征召者——也就是我们的祖先——就是这么一群落入将军兄弟之手的倒霉蛋。”
languages.original_text: "As the stories go, there were plenty of these Brother-Generals. More than enough to claim every decent soul. They treated their troops like toy soldiers, wasting their lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they sent them to the stars, but of course it was just to serve as shields for other regiments. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of just such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."

traits.locale_text: “传说里，这样的将军兄弟多得是，多到足够把所有像样的人都抓走。他们视手下如玩偶，用他们的性命取乐，而不是为神皇效命。有时还会把他们送上星空，但说白了，就是去给别的军团当盾牌。初代征召者——也就是我们的祖先——就是这么一群落入将军兄弟之手的倒霉蛋。”

languages.text: "Den Geschichten zufolge gab es eine ganze Reihe dieser Bruder-Generäle. Mehr als genug, um sich jede anständige Seele einzuverleiben. Sie behandelten ihre Truppen wie Spielzeugsoldaten, vergeudeten ihre Leben nicht für die Sache des Gottimperators, sondern zu ihrer Belustigung. Gelegentlich schickten sie sie zu den Sternen, aber natürlich nur als Schilde für andere Regimenter. Die Erste Einberufung, unsere Vorfahren ... auch sie waren glücklose Seelen, die den Brüdern in die Hände gefallen waren."
languages.original_text: "As the stories go, there were plenty of these Brother-Generals. More than enough to claim every decent soul. They treated their troops like toy soldiers, wasting their lives for sport instead of the God-Emperor's cause. Occasionally they sent them to the stars, but of course it was just to serve as shields for other regiments. The First Call-Up, our ancestors, was made up of just such unfortunate lads who ended up in the Brothers' hands."

traits.locale_text: "Den Geschichten zufolge gab es eine ganze Reihe dieser Bruder-Generäle. Mehr als genug, um sich jede anständige Seele einzuverleiben. Sie behandelten ihre Truppen wie Spielzeugsoldaten, vergeudeten ihre Leben nicht für die Sache des Gottimperators, sondern zu ihrer Belustigung. Gelegentlich schickten sie sie zu den Sternen, aber natürlich nur als Schilde für andere Regimenter. Die Erste Einberufung, unsere Vorfahren ... auch sie waren glücklose Seelen, die den Brüdern in die Hände gefallen waren."

"Den Geschichten zufolge gab es eine ganze Reihe dieser Bruder-Generäle. Mehr als genug, um sich jeden anständigen Mann einzuverleiben. Sie behandelten ihre Männer wie Spielzeugsoldaten, vergeudeten ihre Leben nicht für die Sache des Gottimperators, sondern zu ihrer Belustigung. Gelegentlich schickten sie sie zu den Sternen, aber natürlich nur als Schilde für andere Regimenter. Die Erste Einberufung, unsere Vorfahren ... auch sie waren glücklose Seelen, die den Brüdern in die Hände gefallen waren."
